name: Anju Panta
profileSummary: Anju Panta is a Nepalese ghazals and playback singer. She sang popular songs including the title song of Na birse Timilai na Paye Timilai and Ma Timi Bina Marihaalchhu, Bhun bhun bolyo bhamara of Saput, Dil yo mero dil in Kismat, and Sustari sustari mannma for Darr. Panta sang for more than 300 films and more than 7000 Nepalese songs in duets and solos.
